title: Brightline SaaS retention targeting
summary: Identify which customer segments carry the highest churn risk so Brightline can target one week of retention outreach. Must stay privacy-safe.

requestedCapabilities.reason: The receiver must pick the segmentation dimension and minimum segment size before any numbers are produced.
The request expects one approved customer CSV export for the last fiscal quarter.
The final segment-level report should be staged for receiver approval and then saved locally.

outputContract.description: Privacy-safe segment-level retention report for Brightline.
